items.text: Packaging boundary fixed (closeout found done-when unmet): shipped plugin content moved to ./plugin/ (bin, src/lume, skills, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, front-door README); .lume/, tests/, conftest, docs stay at repo root and are excluded from the installed plugin; marketplace source points at the plugin subdir. Verified: bundled lume runs, dogfooding loop intact, smoke test + full suite green.
Retro: did the work buy back more time than its ceremony cost? (per-step verdict)
Decisions logged; workstream closed (lume close) and handed off.

dod.preamble: Closeout - but a reject surfaced that done-when was NOT met: with the plugin root = repo root, installing lume dragged lume's own .lume/workstreams into the adopter's cache, and there is no file-level exclude in Claude Code. Fix: move shipped content into a ./plugin/ subdir (the documented git-subdir/relative-path pattern) so only plugin/ installs. Then finish the retro honestly and close.

handback: Closeout redone after the packaging-boundary reject. Fix (F9): shipped content moved to ./plugin/ (bin, src/lume, skills, plugin.json, front-door README); marketplace source -> './plugin'; conftest -> plugin/src; smoke test -> plugin/bin/lume; new dev-oriented root README. Result: installing lume brings only plugin/ - lume's .lume/ dev state never ships. 313 tests green; manifests valid; .lume confirmed outside plugin/. Retro (retro.json) updated: net-positive, 7 done-when clauses (the new exclusion one met), 4 carry-forwards (chief: verify live plugin load; next strategic step is value measurement on real n>1 use). On your accept I run `lume close`. Workstream 0008 done. (Also co-located conftest.py into tests/ per operator note - parent.parent->plugin/src; 313 still green.)
self_review: Reject addressed at the root, not patched: research confirmed Claude Code has NO file-level exclude, so shipping only the plugin required a structural move - plugin content into ./plugin/, marketplace source './plugin' (F9, refining F3's intent without burying the engine under .lume). Verified the boundary holds: plugin/ contains only bin/src/skills/README/plugin.json; .lume/, tests/, conftest, docs stay at the repo root and are not in the plugin. 313 tests green via both runners (conftest now points at plugin/src); bundled plugin/bin/lume runs; dogfooding loop intact. Retro updated to record the fix as a met done-when clause and an honest 'what we waved through' section. Remaining open item is unchanged: live plugin load in a real Claude Code session is still only proven mechanically. The single unchecked DoD item is 'lume close' - deferred to your accept.
